title: Yet another Verilator shift bug
body:
--- Author Name: **Clifford Wolf** (@cliffordwolf) Original Redmine Issue: 763 from https://www.veripool.org Original Date: 2014-05-10 Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder) --- This should effectively be y=0, but verilator 1f56312 evaluates y=a instead. ```module issue_041(a, y); input [2:0] a; output [3:0] y; assign y = (a >> 2'b11) >> 1; endmodule ``` Self-contained test case:
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test012.v
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test012.cc
http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2014/verilatortest/test012.sh
